name: Filete Enchocolatado (Beef in Chocolate Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season beef to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Fry beef in butter until browned.
3. Add onion, garlic, white wine, and water. Cover and simmer over gentle heat for about 15 minutes.
4. Add chocolate and simmer, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes.
5. At serving time, slice meat, pour sauce over, and sprinkle with cheese. Broil until cheese melts. Sprinkle with parsley. Makes 6 servings.
Each serving contains about 416 calories, 375 mg sodium, 119 mg cholesterol, 29 grams fat, 3 grams carbohydrates, 34 grams protein, 0.19 gram fiber.
